description: CSS/JS files under docs/ directory - path prefix beats extension
rationale: docs/en/docs/css/custom.css and docs/en/docs/js/custom.js both start with docs/ prefix, so they are classified as docs domain (not ui/unknown). Single domain = PASS.
notes: Edge case: .css file normally would be ui domain, but docs/ prefix is checked first. Path prefix takes priority over file extension.
